title: besleria ecuadorensis
intro: Besleria ecuadorensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, is commonly known as Ecuadorian besleria. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Besleria ecuadorensis include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Besleria ecuadorensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
